scripts.docker:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml down -v && docker compose --env-file .env.seed -f docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.db:counts: docker exec customer-analytics-postgres psql -U app -d customer_analytics -c "SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers) AS customers, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders) AS orders, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_line_items) AS order_line_items;"
